dosierungsaenderungen.label: Dosierungsänderungen
dosierungsaenderungen.description:
Arbitrary number of selected options out of multiple available ones.

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be a list of keys from this `lookup_data` attribute.

Displayed as multi-select field in HTML pages.

anbruch_datum.label: Anbruch-Datum
anbruch_datum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

medikament.label: Medikament
medikament.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Medikamente' with the id `69dc87c2471f4e810f91d118` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69dc87c2471f4e810f91d118/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

nachbestelldatum.label: Datum der Nachbestellung
nachbestelldatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

uebersicht_datum.label: Überprüfungsdatum
uebersicht_datum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

laufende_packungen.label: Packung (als nächstes aufgebraucht)
laufende_packungen.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Packungen' with the id `69dc87c631321f9f593c8572` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69dc87c631321f9f593c8572/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

hinweis.label: Hinweis / Notiz
hinweis.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

name.label: Medikamentenname
name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

wirkstoff.label: Wirkstoff
wirkstoff.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

hersteller.label: Hersteller
hersteller.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

einheit.label: Einheit
einheit.description:

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.
